revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''1-1-345

Phenomenon which is produced by overlapping of waves. Depending on the frequency, the phase and the direction of propagation, this may result in an increase, a decrease or extinction of the energy.

{{IALAFooter}}
